title: premna serrata
intro: Premna serrata, also known as Java tea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Premna serrata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Premna serrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
